title: gagea coreanica
intro: Gagea coreanica, also known as Korean Gagea, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae). It has been traditionally used in Korean medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Gagea coreanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Gagea coreanica is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
